title: L1→L2 distillation over-eager
evidence: [Distill] 12 facts written to L2, 0 skipped — from a 45-minute session. 7 of 12 promoted to L3.
root_cause: Two bugs in memory/pipeline.py::distill_session: (1) minimum importance threshold was 4 (half the scale), accepting small talk, hypotheticals, and Pi's own responses scored 4-5 by Groq. (2) No call to _is_l2_duplicate before writing — same facts re-written every session.
fix_code: Raised threshold from importance<4 to importance<6. Added _is_l2_duplicate call before each memory_write in the non-dry-run path; skips with reason 'duplicate'. Added per-reason skip breakdown to the [Distill] log line: N skipped (M low_importance, K duplicate, J empty).
fix_prompt: Updated _SYSTEM prompt in memory/pipeline.py: explicit INCLUDE ONLY / SKIP lists replacing vague 'genuinely worth keeping'. Changed 'Minimum importance: 4, Maximum items: 12' to 'Minimum importance: 6, Maximum items: 8'.
